subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His are majesty and power, dominion and authority... Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Unto Thee be praise, praise whereby souls stand firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الاقتدار و السلطنته و الاختیار... سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد حمداً یستقیم به النفوس
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
